notes: One canonical user-facing entry per place/counties combination.
Municipality duplicates are collapsed into aliases instead of separate results.
County names are normalized for cleaner labels.
Manual addition: Duved routed to Åre until dedicated page/data exists.
sources: Municipality coordinate: derived from largest locality per municipality in the same dataset.
Resorts/destinations: tagged where possible; otherwise added with approximate coordinates.
